description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. Clash this colour-pop piece with an understated ensemble for maximum impact. Made of synthetic leatherette with metallic brand badge on the front and textured floral on the upper Two braided shoulder handles with a colourful scarf knotted over One main roomy compartment with a zippered pocket and a mobile pouch inside One zippered pocket at the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
